name: widesigner
description: Browser-based woodwind instrument designer — Rust/WASM port of WIDesigner v2.6.0

scripts.wasm: cd ../wid && cargo build --target wasm32-unknown-unknown --release -p wid-wasm && wasm-bindgen target/wasm32-unknown-unknown/release/wid_wasm.wasm --out-dir ../web/wasm --target web
